accounts.name: fee_payer
docs: Relayer pays the SOL fee — enables gasless UX for miners.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The miner. Their pubkey is baked into the PoW hash to prevent front-running.
Also the payer for first-claim user_state rent — prevents griefing relayers
who would otherwise pay rent on attacker-generated wallets.

accounts.name: user_state
docs: Per-user state (rate limit + freeze). Created on first claim, paid by
the authority (not fee_payer) so a malicious miner can't drain a relayer
of rent across many fake wallets.

accounts.name: bond_account
docs: Anti-Sybil bond — must be deposited via `deposit_bond` before mining.
Existence is the proof of bond; the account rent (~0.001 SOL) is the
locked capital. Updated each claim to track withdrawal cooldown.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Mint is created here, atomically with global state.
Authority is immediately the PDA — no external setAuthority call needed.

errors.name: InvalidProofOfWork
errors.msg: Invalid proof of work — nonce does not meet difficulty target

errors.name: SupplyCapReached
errors.msg: Hard supply cap of 1 billion TERM reached

errors.name: RateLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Claim too soon — rate limit active

errors.name: NotAuthority
errors.msg: Signer is not the program authority

errors.name: NotFreezeAuthority
errors.msg: Signer is not the freeze authority

errors.name: CliffNotReached
errors.msg: Vesting cliff period has not passed

errors.name: NothingVested
errors.msg: No tokens vested or all already claimed

errors.name: InsufficientTreasury
errors.msg: Insufficient treasury balance for yield distribution

errors.name: BondLocked
errors.msg: Bond is locked — wait for cooldown to withdraw

errors.name: WrongBondKind
errors.msg: Wrong bond kind — use the matching withdraw instruction (SOL vs TERM)

errors.name: NotPendingAuthority
errors.msg: Signer is not the pending authority
